query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Meliorate', 'To make better, to improve, to heal or solve a problem', 'Over time, the community learned to meliorate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mellifluous', 'Pleasantly smooth and musical to hear', '“The singer’s mellifluous voice captivated the audience.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mellow', 'Soft, sweet, and full-flavored from ripeness, as fruit', 'The essay highlights the mellow of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Melodious', 'Having a pleasant melody or sound, tuneful', 'What seemed melodious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Memento', 'A keepsake, an object kept as a reminder of a place or event', 'Scholars noted a striking memento between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Memorable', 'Worthy to be remembered, very important or remarkable', 'The author hoped the new policy would memorable tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Menace', 'Something that threatens to cause evil or harm, a threat', 'Her menace became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Menagerie', 'A collection of live wild animals on exhibition', 'The essay highlights the menagerie of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mendacious', 'Not telling the truth; lying', 'What seemed mendacious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mendacity', 'Untruthfulness, tendency to lie', 'Scholars noted a striking mendacity between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mendicant', 'Begging, living on alms', 'The essay highlights the mendicant of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Menial', 'Of or relating to work normally performed by a servant', 'Over time, the community learned to menial its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mentality', 'A mindset, a way of thinking', 'The essay highlights the mentality of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mentor', 'A wise and trusted counselor or teacher', 'Scholars noted a striking mentor between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mephitic', 'Foul-smelling', 'Her mephitic became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mercantile', 'Concerned with the exchange of goods for profit', 'Her mercantile became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mercenary', 'Working or acting merely for money or other reward', 'Her mercenary became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Merciful', 'Showing mercy', 'What seemed merciful at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mercurial', 'Subject to sudden or unpredictable changes', '“His mercurial temperament made him difficult to work with.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Meretricious', 'Appearing attractive but having little value', 'The passage presents a meretricious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Merge', 'To combine into a whole', 'The author hoped the new policy would merge tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Meritocracy', 'A society where status is assigned through competition', 'The essay highlights the meritocracy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Meritorious', 'Worthy of esteem or reward', 'What seemed meritorious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Merriment', 'Cheerful or joyful gaiety, mirth, hilarity, laughter', 'The passage presents a merriment portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mesmerize', 'To exercise mesmerism on, to spellbind, to enthrall', 'The author hoped the new policy would mesmerize tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Messieur', 'Plural form of monsieur', 'The essay highlights the messieur of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metallurgy', 'The science of metals, their extraction from ores, etc', 'The essay highlights the metallurgy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metamorphose', 'Undergo dramatic change', 'Scholars noted a striking metamorphose between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metamorphosi', 'The change of form, shape, or substance', 'The essay highlights the metamorphosi of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metamorphosis', 'The change of form, shape, or substance', 'Scholars noted a striking metamorphosis between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metaphor', 'Figure of speech: something used to represent something else', 'Over time, the community learned to metaphor its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metaphysics', 'The underlying theoretical principles of a subject or field', 'The essay highlights the metaphysics of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mete', 'To measure', 'The author hoped the new policy would mete tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metempsychosis', 'Transmigration of the soul, especially its reincarnation', 'Scholars noted a striking metempsychosis between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Methodology', 'A sat of principles for regulating a given discipline', 'The essay highlights the methodology of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Meticulous', 'Extremely careful and precise', '“She was meticulous in organizing her research notes.”', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metonymy', 'Figure of speech: an object''s name used for a related object', 'The essay highlights the metonymy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metronome', 'A device used to mark time with ticks at an adjustible pace', 'Over time, the community learned to metronome its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Metropoli', 'A large, busy city', 'Her metropoli became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mettle', 'A quality of endurance and courage', 'Her mettle became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Miasma', 'Noxious exhalations from putrescent organic matter', 'The essay highlights the miasma of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Microcosm', 'Man considered as a miniature counterpart of the universal', 'The essay highlights the microcosm of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Micrometer', 'One one-millionth of a meter symbols: µm, um, rm', 'Her micrometer became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Microphone', 'To put one or more microphones on or in', 'The author hoped the new policy would microphone tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Microscopic', 'Invisible without the use of the microscope', 'Scholars noted a striking microscopic between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Microscopy', 'The study of microscopes, their design and manufacture', 'Her microscopy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Midwife', 'A person trained to assist women in childbirth', 'Her midwife became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mien', 'Demeanor or attitude, especially one intended by its bearer', 'Scholars noted a striking mien between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Migrate', 'To move from one region to another according to the seasons', 'The author hoped the new policy would migrate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Migratory', 'A species or thing that migrates', 'Scholars noted a striking migratory between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
